title: Gate 61: Inner Truth
description: You receive flashes of inner truth — direct knowing that comes from somewhere beyond your mind. You're built to seek universal understanding and inspire others to do the same. Live your knowing; don't wait for other people's validation.
learningGoal: The viewer understands what Gate 61 (Inner Truth — Inner Truth Through Direct Knowing) means in their daily life, in plain terms.
keyPoints: You receive flashes of inner truth
direct knowing that comes from somewhere beyond your mind.
You're built to seek universal understanding and inspire others to do the same.
Live your knowing; don't wait for other people's validation.
forbiddenClaims: a gate guarantees a talent you do not have to develop
gates rank people as better or worse
an activated gate forces a fixed behaviour

variants.angleNote: THE GIFT — what this gives you. Recognition, the quiet power of it. Make them feel seen.
variants.hook: Gate 61: Inner Truth — the part most people miss.
variants.participationPrompt: Does this land? Drop a ✦ if this is you.

variants.angleNote: THE SHADOW — the not-self trap, the misalignment signal to watch for. Honest, never fearful.
variants.hook: Gate 61: Inner Truth — the trap nobody warns you about.
variants.participationPrompt: Caught yourself here before? Tell me where.

variants.angleNote: THE PRACTICE — one concrete move for today. Action-oriented, motion-forward, doable now.
variants.hook: Gate 61: Inner Truth — try this today.
variants.participationPrompt: Try it today. Come back and tell me what shifted.

variants.angleNote: THE MIRROR — how this shows up with other people. The relational lens.
variants.hook: Gate 61: Inner Truth — why it changes every room you enter.
variants.participationPrompt: Who in your life does this explain? Tag the feeling.

toneNotes: Oracle/sage register: warm, recognition-based, unhurried, mythic but grounded. Speak directly to the viewer. No jargon, no hype, no fear.

output_metadata.title: Gate 61: Inner Truth — Your Energy Blueprint
output_metadata.description: You receive flashes of inner truth — direct knowing that comes from somewhere beyond your mind. You're built to seek universal understanding and inspire others to do the same. Live your knowing; don't wait for other people's validation.
